_readme: managed-settings.json — Org-Level Claude Code Enforcement Template
IMPORTANT: This file is a TEMPLATE. It must be deployed separately
from the project repo to each developer machine. It is NOT enforced
simply by being in the repo. See deployment instructions below.
via Jamf, Kandji, or any MDM as a managed preference
Configure at: claude.ai > Admin > Developer Settings > Managed Settings
Copy to the path above on your machine
Settings here CANNOT be overridden by project or user settings.
Remove the _readme AND _notes fields before deploying.
The Makefile deploy-settings target does this automatically.
If deploying manually, delete both fields from the JSON.

_notes.strictKnownMarketplaces: Verify this setting name against current Claude Code documentation before use — setting names may change between releases
_notes.mcpServers: To restrict MCP servers org-wide, add approved server configs here using the same format as .claude/settings.json mcpServers. Remove this _notes block before deploying.
